accommodations.text: Accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting.
accommodations.source_quote: accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting

accommodations.text: Provide captions or a transcript for audio and video media.
accommodations.source_quote: captions or a transcript for audio and video media

accommodations.text: Provide visual supports and models for new tasks.
accommodations.source_quote: visual supports and models for new tasks

accommodations.text: Seat near the point of instruction and away from high-traffic areas.
accommodations.source_quote: preferential seating near the point of instruction

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on all classroom tests and quizzes.
accommodations.source_quote: 50% extended time on all classroom tests and quizzes

accommodations.text: Administer assessments in a small-group, reduced-distraction setting.
Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.
accommodations.source_quote: no unplanned oral responses in front of the class

accommodations.text: Read test directions and math word problems aloud on request.
accommodations.source_quote: read test directions and math word problems aloud

services.source_quote: Language processing support group 30 minutes twice weekly; provider TBD
Speech and language therapy 30 minutes twice weekly

goals.text: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Accepts a change in routine in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: accept a change in routine using a coping strategy

goals.text: Ethan will arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days.
goals.baseline: Arrives with required materials in 3 of 10 class days.
goals.source_quote: arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days

goals.text: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Retells a narrative with only a beginning in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline
